summary: Tester thought RidePod dispatches the taxi
tester_quote: So RidePod sends the taxi after I click create?
what_happened: Tester read the landing page and assumed RidePod directly sends a taxi.
expected_behavior: Tester should understand RidePod groups riders and requests a licensed taxi partner quote.
why_it_matters: This creates trust and legal positioning risk before beta.
suggested_fix: Strengthen public positioning and How It Works copy around external licensed taxi partners.

summary: Tester confused demo acceptance with live payment
tester_quote: Did my card get charged now?
what_happened: Tester accepted a quote in demo mode and was unsure whether live money moved.
expected_behavior: Tester should understand no live payment happens in demo mode.
actual_behavior: Demo acceptance copy was not noticed.
why_it_matters: Payment confusion is a major trust issue.
suggested_fix: Make no live payment helper more prominent on guest quote acceptance.

tester_quote: There is a lot here before I create the pod.
what_happened: Tester could complete Review Pod but paused to read every section.
expected_behavior: Review Pod should be scannable with taxi summary, quote process, taxi needs, and who-can-join.
actual_behavior: Review screen was understandable but dense.
suggested_fix: Batch into Review Pod copy and section hierarchy cleanup.

tester_quote: I am not sure which update matters first.
what_happened: Tester saw multiple demo updates and was unsure which needed action.
expected_behavior: Updates should make the next action obvious by role and status.
why_it_matters: Noisy updates can weaken next-action clarity.
suggested_fix: Add role/scenario filters or stronger priority grouping later.

summary: Tester preferred different taxi type icon
tester_quote: The accessible taxi icon could be clearer.
what_happened: Tester completed taxi type selection but commented on the icon.
expected_behavior: Taxi type options should be understandable and polished.
actual_behavior: Icon preference did not block completion.
suggested_fix: Defer unless multiple testers mention the same icon.
